workflows.scope: Session logic, break tiers, overlays, and pace nudges
Local storage contracts, keys, schema versions, and persistence-safe changes
Browser validation, responsive checks, screenshots, and fallback review
English-first strings, glossary updates, and future localization prep
Watcher, search, and artifact hygiene for the local workspace
Repo validation routines, future CI hooks, and repo-state caveats
Commit, branch, worktree, push, and publish safety
Assistant docs sync, bridge/canonical hygiene, and user-guide updates

contracts.template_read_policy: docs/assistant/templates/* is read-only template material and should not be edited during app work.
contracts.post_change_docs_sync_prompt_policy: After significant implementation changes, ask exactly: Would you like me to run Assistant Docs Sync for this change now?
contracts.sub_agent_routing_policy: The main agent is the integrator; sub-agents are for narrow, bounded, mostly read-heavy exploration, disjoint validation, or tightly scoped docs work.
contracts.validation_environment_policy: Use WSL-safe wrappers for npm commands from this environment and treat http://127.0.0.1:4173 as the canonical local URL.
contracts.artifact_capture_policy: UI validation artifacts live under output/playwright/ and include desktop screenshot, mobile screenshot, summary JSON, and failure artifacts when needed.
contracts.validation_fallback_policy: When broad browser automation is unavailable, use the repo-owned validate-ui harness plus targeted tests and manual review instead of pretending a missing suite exists.
contracts.user_guides_support_usage_policy: Support and non-technical explanation tasks should start with the app user guides, then confirm against canonical technical docs if needed.
contracts.user_guides_canonical_deference_policy: User guides explain behavior plainly, but canonical technical docs and source code win when details conflict.
contracts.user_guides_update_sync_policy: Update only the user guides touched by the confirmed change; do not rewrite unrelated guides.
contracts.execplan_policy: Major or multi-file work should use docs/assistant/exec_plans/PLANS.md and create a plan in exec_plans/active/.
contracts.approval_gates_policy: AGENTS.md and agent.md define ask-before-execute triggers for destructive, risky, publish, history-rewrite, and non-essential network actions.
contracts.worktree_isolation_policy: This repo is git-backed now. Use worktrees or isolated branches for major parallel work, and prefer WSL-native git from this environment.
contracts.ui_surface_validation_policy: docs/assistant/workflows/UI_SURFACE_VALIDATION_WORKFLOW.md is the source of truth for browser validation flow, environment matrix, locators, artifacts, and fallback behavior.
contracts.benchmark_matrix_policy: Create or refresh a benchmark matrix only for parity-sensitive UI work against named references.
contracts.inspiration_reference_discovery_policy: Run docs/assistant/workflows/REFERENCE_DISCOVERY_WORKFLOW.md before implementation decisions when the user requests parity or inspiration from a named product.
